description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the alpine:latest Docker image with three stages: build, test, and deploy. In the build stage add a build job that runs "apk update && apk add --no-cache make cmake g++ git autoconf gcovr sdl2-dev linux-headers util-linux-dev zlib", then creates a build directory, runs "cmake -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Debug ..", builds with "cmake --build . --config Debug --target all -- -j 12", returns to the project root, and stores the build/ directory as an artifact that expires in 2 hours. In the test stage add a test job that runs the same apk install plus valgrind, executes "cd build", runs "ctest -j12", generates coverage with "gcovr -r .. -e /builds/bitingbytes/onion-engine/build* -e /builds/bitingbytes/onion-engine/test* -e /builds/bitingbytes/onion-engine/include/subsystem/configuration/json.h" and an HTML report with "gcovr -r .. --html --html-details -o index.html -e /builds/bitingbytes/onion-engine/build* -e /builds/bitingbytes/onion-engine/test* -e /builds/bitingbytes/onion-engine/include/subsystem/configuration/json.h", returns to the root, and uploads the build/ artifact (2‑hour expiry). In the deploy stage add a deploy job that depends on build, runs "apk update && apk add --no-cache make cmake g++ git autoconf gcovr sdl2-dev linux-headers valgrind", changes to the build output directory, runs "cpack", creates a public/ folder, moves any "onionengine*.deb" files into public/, and publishes public/ as an artifact (1‑day expiry) only for tag pipelines. Also in the deploy stage add a pages job that runs only on the master and develop branches, installs doxygen via "apk update && apk add --no-cache doxygen", generates documentation with "mkdir docs && doxygen Doxyfile", moves the generated docs/html to public/, and publishes the public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact.
